name: LV-Eval
capability_target: Long-context QA at 16k, 32k, 64k, 128k, and 256k with confusing facts and keyword/phrase replacement.

input_contract.metadata: official source card and length/task taxonomy
input_contract.context: private long QA contexts with confusing facts
input_contract.evidence: supporting answer keyword rows and confusing-fact rows
input_contract.memory_system: VCM and non-VCM baselines under equal context budgets

output_contract.answer_accuracy: exact local answer or keyword recall for private analogues
output_contract.residuals: confuser selected, keyword miss, multi-hop miss, or length degradation

smoke_steps: record MIT code and CC-BY-SA data split
stage public payloads only after dataset license partition review
mirror confusing-fact and length buckets with private analogues
contamination_policy: Public LV-Eval content is calibration-only. No public contexts, answer keywords, confusing facts, prompts, answers, or templates enter training rows.
regression_policy: If mastered, keep private confusing-fact rows as regression and track public LV-Eval only through exact-run manifests.

permission_envelope.memory: metadata and private analogues until payload stage is explicitly admitted
permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, and report writers

teacher_role: No teacher solving. Teacher may not grade or repair public LV-Eval rows.
